profile: Delegation-integrity conformance vectors (real Class-A/B receipts + real Ed25519 delegation proofs). verifyProvenanceOffline(input.provenance_chain, {delegationKeys: input.delegation_keys, now: input.now_ms}) MUST return expect.valid; each refusal trips expect.check and emits an error containing expect.error_includes.
description: Positive controls plus two classic delegation attacks refused fail-closed: (1) AUTHORITY LAUNDERING — a child scope/cap the ancestor chain never conferred (incl. wildcard widening); (2) DELEGATION CHAIN POISONING — an unsigned, tampered, wrong-key, or spliced/unanchored link. Plus the ROOT case: no human root signoff yields no authority.
algorithm: Ed25519 delegation proofs over RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical fields; Class-A human signoffs over WebAuthn-shaped P-256/ES256; verifier packages/verify/provenance.js

vectors.description: Control: signed, human-rooted chain narrowing payment.* down to payment.release. ACCEPTS.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: Control: two-hop chain, each hop scope-contained by the prior. ACCEPTS.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: Control: a child wildcard payment.* that stays within the parent wildcard payment.*. ACCEPTS (narrowing/equal, not widening).

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: Child claims scope treasury.wire that the root authority (payment.*) never conferred. MUST refuse: scope_containment.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: Root confers only the concrete scope payment.release; child uses wildcard payment.* to widen beyond it. MUST refuse: scope_containment.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: Child raises the value cap ($999999) above the parent cap ($1000) it was delegated. MUST refuse: scope_containment (cap containment).

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: A link with no cryptographic proof spliced into the chain. MUST refuse fail-closed: delegations_signed.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: A validly-signed link whose scope/cap were widened after signing; the proof no longer covers the visible fields. MUST refuse: delegations_signed (proof not over own fields).

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: A link whose proof is self-consistent but signed by a key NOT the one pinned to the delegator. MUST refuse: proof_key_bound.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

expect.error_includes: not the key bound to delegator

vectors.description: A second hop inserted whose delegator/parent_ref do not bind to the prior hop delegatee (splice/reorder). MUST refuse: chain_links_bound.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

expect.error_includes: does not bind to prior delegatee

vectors.description: Chain head names a delegator/parent_ref that is not an approver on the root human signoff. MUST refuse: chain_anchored.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

expect.error_includes: does not name a root-receipt approver

vectors.description: Root receipt carries only a Class-B (software) signoff, no human key_class in [A]. Authority from nothing. MUST refuse: root_human_signoff.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: The root human signoff is absent. No authority can be derived from nothing. MUST refuse: root_receipt_valid.

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

vectors.description: Authority laundering via the unsigned parent_ref. A validly-signed head link whose delegator is a stranger sets parent_ref to a real root approver (ep:approver:dir). parent_ref is not a signed proof field, so it MUST NOT anchor the chain to that human. Regression for the head-anchoring hole (was accepted before the fix).

provenance_metadata.note: Composition of existing EP-RECEIPT-v1 receipts + DRP delegation references. No new trust.

expect.error_includes: does not name a root-receipt approver
